_readme: This file lists the organizations the bot checks.
Set 'enabled': true to turn a source on, false to skip it.
You do NOT need to understand the fields — send Nicolas (the bot builder)
an organization's careers-page URL and he will fill in the correct entry.
The bot reports every source's status to Telegram, so a wrong entry is obvious.

sources._comment: TEMPLATE — Workday. Find the tenant/datacenter/site in the careers URL, e.g. https://TENANT.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/SITE
sources.name: Example Workday Org

sources._comment: TEMPLATE — Greenhouse. 'token' is the board name in boards.greenhouse.io/TOKEN
sources.name: Example Greenhouse Org

sources._comment: TEMPLATE — Lever. 'company' is the name in jobs.lever.co/COMPANY
sources.name: Example Lever Org

sources._comment: TEMPLATE — SmartRecruiters. 'company' is the identifier in jobs.smartrecruiters.com/COMPANY
sources.name: Example SmartRecruiters Org

sources._comment: TEMPLATE — RSS/Atom feed published by an organization.
sources.name: Example RSS Org
